C.P No. D-1121 of 2021 31. C.P No. D-1222 of 2021 32. C.P No. D-1226 of 2021 33. C.P No. D-1282 of 2021 34. C.P No. D-1284 of 2021 35. C.P No. D-1331 of 2021 36. C.P No. D-1382 of 2021 37. C.P No. D-1495 of 2021 None present for the petitioner(s). Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, Addl. Advocate General, Sindh. 11.11.2021 O R D E R Through these petitions, the petitioner(s) are seeking direction to the official respondents to act strictly in accordance with law and provided legal protection to them as guaranteed under Article 25-A of the Constitution of Islamic Republic of Pakistan, 1973. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, learned Addl. A.G Sindh present in Court submits that official respondents will act strictly in accordance with law and will provide legal protection to the petitioners as and when required by them in accordance with law. In view of the statement of learned Addl. A.G, all these petitions stand disposed of with no order as to costs. JUDGE JUDGE *Hafiz Fahad*
